events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Ageless Rocker
angles.copy: Still got the moves at 83! Happy Birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger. What's your go-to Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV launched, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched with *that* iconic first video. Did video really kill the radio star?

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Classic
angles.copy: It's 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. Which track from the album still sounds absolutely biblical?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Festival, a pivotal moment in music history, concluded on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Legacy
angles.copy: 57 years since the mud and music of Woodstock. If you could have been there, which artist would you have loved to see?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Remembering the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the King of Rock & Roll, Elvis Presley. His music lives on forever.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Remembering influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: On the anniversary of his passing, we remember the legendary Tupac Shakur. His impact on music and culture remains profound.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Remembering the groundbreaking guitarist Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: The world lost a true visionary on this day. Remembering the unparalleled talent of Jimi Hendrix.

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Icon
angles.copy: 57 years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. What's your favourite track from this timeless masterpiece?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Power
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! What's your favourite Pretenders song?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis icon and solo artist Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite tune from the man himself?

events.title: John Lennon released Imagine (1975)
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released on this day in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 51 years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. A message that still resonates today.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple revolutionised portable music forever with the release of the first iPod on this day in 2001.

angles.name: Rewind to iPod
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? 25 years ago, Apple changed how we listen to music. How many songs did you cram onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Celebrating James Bond Day, marking the release date of the first Bond film, Dr. No, in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Which Bond theme tune is your absolute favourite?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering The Beatles' co-founder John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we celebrate the enduring genius of John Lennon. What's your favourite Lennon song?
